code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        if count == 0
          nums = [cur, 0]
        else if count == 1
          nums = [nums[0], cur]
        end
        count = count + 1
        cur = 0
        in_num = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if count == 0
      nums = [cur, 0]
    else if count == 1
      nums = [nums[0], cur]
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  mut a = nums[0]
  mut b = nums[1]
  while b != 0
    let t = a % b
    a = b
    b = t
  end
  println("gcd=#{a}")
end
